choice: One as-of date per file (defaults to today, editable at import time), and the import always runs through a pre-commit PREVIEW that shows matched / new / absent-flagged / errored rows before anything is written.
rationale: A single per-file date matches how a brokerage statement is dated and keeps the as-of stamp (9b7cc94d) coherent; per-row dating is input burden with no v1 payoff. A mandatory preview is the cheap safety net that makes the snapshot-with-flag reconciliation (csv-reconciliation) and unknown-ticker handling (csv-matching-unknowns) auditable before they touch authoritative actuals.
